2604.09035.title: Advantage-Guided Diffusion for Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
2604.09035.paper_summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) with autoregressive world models suffers from compounding errors, whereas diffusion world models mitigate this by generating trajectory segments jointly. However, existing diffusion guides are either policy-only, discarding value information, or reward-based, which becomes myopic when the diffusion horizon is short. We introduce Advantage-Guided Diffusion for MBRL (AGD-MBRL), which steers the reverse diffusion process using the agent's advantage estimates so that sampling concentrates on trajectories expected to yield higher long-term return beyond the generated window. We develop two guides: (i) Sigmoid Advantage Guidance (SAG) and (ii) Exponential Advantage Guidance (EAG). We prove that a diffusion model guided through SAG or EAG allows us to perform reweighted sampling of trajectories with weights increasing in state-action advantage-implying policy improvement under standard assumptions. Additionally, we show that the trajectories generated from AGD-MBRL follow an improved policy (that is, with higher value) compared to an unguided diffusion model. AGD integrates seamlessly with PolyGRAD-style architectures by guiding the state components while leaving action generation policy-conditioned, and requires no change to the diffusion training objective. On MuJoCo control tasks (HalfCheetah, Hopper, Walker2D and Reacher), AGD-MBRL improves sample efficiency and final return over PolyGRAD, an online Diffuser-style reward guide, and model-free baselines (PPO/TRPO), in some cases by a margin of 2x. These results show that advantage-aware guidance is a simple, effective remedy for short-horizon myopia in diffusion-model MBRL.
2604.09035.paper_summary_zh: 基於模型的強化學習（MBRL）使用自回歸世界模型時會遭遇累積錯誤，而擴散世界模型則透過共同生成軌跡片段來減輕這一問題。然後，現有的擴散引導要麼僅基於策略，捨棄價值信息，要麼基於獎勵，當擴散視野較短時會變得短視。我們介紹了針對MBRL的優勢引導擴散（AGD-MBRL），它利用代理的優勢估計來引導反向擴散過程，使得取樣集中在預期能夠在生成窗口之外產生更高長期回報的軌跡上。我們開發了兩種引導方法：（i）S型優勢引導（SAG）和（ii）指數優勢引導（EAG）。我們證明了通過SAG或EAG引導的擴散模型允許我們對軌跡進行重加權取樣，權重隨著狀態-行動優勢而增加，這意味著在標準假設下的策略改進。此外，我們顯示AGD-MBRL生成的軌跡遵循一個改進的策略（即具有更高的價值），與未引導的擴散模型相比。AGD與PolyGRAD風格的架構無縫集成，通過引導狀態組件，同時保持行動生成的策略條件，並且不需要改變擴散訓練目標。在MuJoCo控制任務（HalfCheetah、Hopper、Walker2D和Reacher）中，AGD-MBRL在某些情況下提高了樣本效率和最終回報，相比於PolyGRAD、一種在線擴散器風格的獎勵引導和無模型基準（PPO/TRPO），提高幅度可達2倍。這些結果表明，基於優勢的引導是解決擴散模型MBRL中短視問題的一種簡單而有效的辦法。
2604.09035.author: Daniele Foffano et.al.
2604.09035.authors: Daniele Foffano, Arvid Eriksson, David Broman, Karl H. Johansson, Alexandre Proutiere
